texto: I like to talk. That's why I can't karaoke in a private room. Those types of shenanigans are only good in a public space. I got to say, though, with smartphones and instant upload of everything, our generation and definitely the next generation coming up, it's going to be hard to act a fool.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Liza Lapira: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a inteligencia. O trecho “I like to talk. That's why I can't karaoke in a private room. Those types of shenanigans are only…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, good, fool pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fool e generation.

frase_original: I like to talk. That's why I can't karaoke in a private room. Those types of shenanigans are only good in a public space. I got to say, though, with smartphones and instant upload of everything, our generation and definitely the next generation coming up, it's going to be hard to act a fool.
